title: athlete-enrollment — published macros
description: No dedicated request-level macros — enrollment context is composite (team + athlete + season) + resolved via route bindings.

blueprint_macros.name: Blueprint::enrollmentSnapshot
blueprint_macros.adds: Adds the shared column family for enrollment-adjacent snapshot columns: `age_group_snapshot_id` (uuid nullable + FK to age_groups) + `age_group_snapshot_at` (timestamptz nullable). Reserved for Wave 4+ Event/Session modules that need similar snapshot semantics.
